column1: Yandy Diaz leads the slate with elite consistency, hitting safely in over 81% of games and drawing a favorable matchup against Parker Messick, who has struggled recently. Oneil Cruz also offers strong upside atop the order with a platoon edge and a hitter-friendly park, though his recent form lags behind Diaz. Ernie Clement’s hot streak and reliable contact skills make him a solid alternative if looking beyond the top two. All three bring steady profiles for Beat The Streak players.
